title: Ego Dissolution and LSD
wikitext:
[]: Ego Dissolution and LSD             Quote Post by WaxHearted » Thu Aug 29, 2019 1:41 am Just about everyone knows about acid and the psychedelic affect it has on peoples minds. I don't trip, but I think it sounds like fun. The point I want to make is that I happened upon a YouTube video that reviewed LSD and what it does to people. It briefly covered Ego Dissolution, which is described as feeling a barrier between yourself and others/everything around you. I didn't look too much more into it because the first thing to come to mind was "/EVANGELION!? AT FIELDS!?/" Tell me what you think about that. The video: https://youtu.be/wG5JyorwYPo

[]: Re: Ego Dissolution and LSD             Quote Post by Zoop » Thu Aug 29, 2019 6:37 am I vaguely recall there being a movie that has been compared to EoE a few times, about a guy who experiments with psychedelic drugs to perform a sort of one-man human instrumentality project and in the end he succeeds. So you're not the first to link the barrier-thing (at fields) and breaking it down and its connection to psychedelic drugs. I just wish I could remember the name of the movie ...

[]: Re: Ego Dissolution and LSD             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Aug 30, 2019 7:22 am @Zoop : Altered States , probably? All Eva fans should watch it; you'll never look at episode 19 the same way again.

[]: Re: Ego Dissolution and LSD             Quote Post by SawItAtAge10 » Fri Aug 30, 2019 2:08 pm Reichu wrote: @Zoop : Altered States , probably? All Eva fans should watch it; you'll never look at episode 19 the same way again.

[]: Re: Ego Dissolution and LSD             Quote Post by WaxHearted » Fri Aug 30, 2019 3:22 pm Excellence. J saying though, we should start experimenting with giant robots and mind expanding drugs simultaneously

Article: Ego Dissolution and LSD
[]: Ego Dissolution and LSD             Quote Post by WaxHearted » Thu Aug 29, 2019 1:41 am Just about everyone knows about acid and the psychedelic affect it has on peoples minds. I don't trip, but I think it sounds like fun. The point I want to make is that I happened upon a YouTube video that reviewed LSD and what it does to people. It briefly covered Ego Dissolution, which is described as feeling a barrier between yourself and others/everything around you. I didn't look too much more into it because the first thing to come to mind was "/EVANGELION!? AT FIELDS!?/" Tell me what you think about that. The video: https://youtu.be/wG5JyorwYPo

So you're not the first to link the barrier-thing (at fields) and breaking it down and its connection to psychedelic drugs. I just wish I could remember the name of the movie ...
